# Unihan_IRGSources.txt
# Date: 2025-07-24 00:00:00 GMT [KL]
# Unicode Version 17.0.0
#

# For documentation, see https://www.unicode.org/reports/tr38/
#
# Trimmed P37-4 fixture slice: the radical-stroke fields kRSUnicode and
# kTotalStrokes for a handful of the codepoints already carried in the
# Readings/Variants siblings (real UCD values), plus one non-carried field
# (kIRG_GSource) per codepoint so the parser's censor is exercised. The
# real member carries the whole IRG source-reference set.
#
U+4E00	kIRG_GSource	G0-523B
U+4E00	kRSUnicode	1.0
U+4E00	kTotalStrokes	1
U+4EBA	kIRG_GSource	G0-4842
U+4EBA	kRSUnicode	9.0
U+4EBA	kTotalStrokes	2
U+5929	kIRG_GSource	G0-4C6C
U+5929	kRSUnicode	37.1
U+5929	kTotalStrokes	4
U+611B	kIRG_GSource	G0-302E
U+611B	kRSUnicode	61.9
U+611B	kTotalStrokes	13
U+68C4	kIRG_GSource	G0-4674
U+68C4	kRSUnicode	75.8
U+68C4	kTotalStrokes	12
